name: AVEC FlowState Mango Spritzer (6 bottles)
description: FLOWSTATE Mango Spritzer begins with a crisp wine base, gently de-alcoholised, and lifted with juicy tropical mango and sparkling bubbles for a refreshing twist. Our FLOWSTATE™ L-theanine supports clarity and calm, helping you stay present and unwind.

description: FLOWSTATE Shiraz begins with a full-bodied wine base, gently de-alcoholised, and layered with botanicals for depth and balance. Our FLOWSTATE™ L-theanine supports clarity and calm, helping you stay present and unwind.

description: FLOWSTATE Yuzu Spritz is a bright and refreshing blend crafted from crisp apple cider vinegar, yuzu extract and green tea. Lightly sparkling and beautifully balanced, it offers a zesty citrus profile with gentle botanical notes.

description: ALTINA Finger Lime Sauvignon Blanc The perfect blend of premium de-alcoholised Sauvignon Blanc wine and Native Australian Finger Lime. Bright aroma of white nectarine and fresh cucumber. A crisp, lingering finish underpinned with herbaceous notes.
